subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter was received, and from the Most Exalted Pen hath been revealed its answer. The souls who in this day have turned towards the Dawning-Place of Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله کتابت مشاهده شد و از قلم اعلی جواب آن نازل نفوسیکه الیوم بمطلع وحی اقبال
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence of; reunion with God
